summary: A wildly exciting show with Jerry on fire, standout Let It Grow and a soaring Peggy‑O; recording quality not discussed.
review: The reviewer raves about the first set’s excitement and Jerry Garcia’s incendiary playing, calling his tone “on” and highlighting a superb Peg­gy‑O solo and the Let It Grow performance. The second set is described as a jazz masterpiece with dramatic highs and lows, though no specifics on recording quality are given.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed review gives the show a perfect 5‑star rating with glowing language; lacking any recording commentary forces a modest deduction and lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on sound source or clarity; unable to assess technical quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as packed with excitement and wide‑open playing; second set praised for its jazzy, free‑form dynamics.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as "sooooo on" with perfect tone – essentially 'on fire'.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mention of "Tom thumbs is one of the best" suggests strong drum work.
